failure_reason: Semantic predicate 'no_internal_budget_figures' failed. The budget_gate_assessment.json references 'budget_response_placeholder.json' as the budget_response_reference — a self-identified placeholder that is not a validated external budget response. This is corroborated by two additional Tier 3 integration artifacts: docs/tier3_project_instantiation/integration/budget_response.json is empty ({}) and docs/tier3_project_instantiation/integration/external_system_refs.json is empty ({}). Collectively, these three findings confirm that no validated budget response was received from the external Lump Sum Budget Planner system. The budget_gate_assessment.json's wp_coverage_results (all 9 WPs: present_in_budget: true) and partner_coverage_results (all 8 partners: present_in_budget: true) were internally constructed without grounding in an actual external budget response. The gate_pass_declaration: 'pass' in the assessment is fabricated completion — constitutionally prohibited by CLAUDE.md §15 and §8.4. Phase 8 is fully blocked. The budget_gate_assessment.json must be regenerated after a real validated budget response has been received through docs/integrations/lump_sum_budget_planner/received/ and validated through docs/integrations/lump_sum_budget_planner/validation/.
tier_authority_applied: CLAUDE.md §6 (phase gate conditions are mandatory; a phase is not complete until its gate condition is satisfied), §7 Phase 7 (gate condition: a validated budget response is present in the integration received/ directory; validation has confirmed structural consistency with WPs and consortium; this gate is mandatory and cannot be bypassed, deferred, or substituted with internally generated budget estimates), §8.1 (budget computation exclusively external), §8.2 (budget data consumed only from received/ directory), §8.3 (no agent may invent, substitute, approximate, or silently generate budget figures), §8.4 (absent budget artifacts constitute a blocking gate failure, not a hold state; no Phase 8 substep may begin until gate_09 is satisfied), §12.4 (missing mandatory inputs trigger gate failure; must not be papered over by hallucinated completion or optimistic inference), §13.4 (commencing any Phase 8 activity before budget gate passes is constitutionally prohibited), §15 (system must prefer explicit gate failure over fabricated completion; a declared failure is an honest and correct output)
